_comment: Curated strategic watchlist for Trend Scout explain/replay runs. These repos do not force issue creation; they let operators measure whether adjacent-recall lanes still surface important repo classes over time.

entries.notes: Rust coding-agent harness with memory, MCP/provider surfaces, and orchestration patterns adjacent to this project.
RTK-class token-efficiency CLI tool; validates that the token-efficiency-cli lane surfaces streaming/token-management repos adjacent to this project's context-window concerns.

Caveman-class Claude Code skill repo. Publishes a reusable AGENTS.md skill that enforces terse/caveman communication style to reduce token consumption. Topics: claude-code, skill, tokens, prompt-engineering, anthropic, claude. Previously skipped by Trend Scout due to discovery vocabulary/topic gap — primary and adjacent lanes lacked claude-code/skill/anthropic topic coverage.
